slots.name: Direct Railjet train: Munich → Vienna
slots.description: Budget-friendly direct ÖBB/DB Railjet-style train from München Hbf to Wien Hbf. Exact July 2026 schedules are not finalized yet; typical direct journey is about 4 hours. Book Sparschiene/advance fares when released.
slots.notes: Estimated one-way cost for 2 adults: €25 each plus small seat reservation allowance.

slots.name: Transfer: Wien Hbf → Hotel Pension Walzerstadt
slots.description: Take Vienna public transport from Wien Hbf toward Zieglergasse/1070 district. Routing API unavailable due missing key, but hotel is near U3 Zieglergasse and Wien Hbf connects via U1/U-Bahn network.
slots.notes: Covered by 7-day Vienna digital ticket added separately.

slots.name: Buy 7-day Vienna public transport tickets
slots.description: Buy two digital 7-day Vienna core-zone tickets. 2026 fare source indicates €25.20 per person and better value than abolished 48/72-hour tickets.
slots.notes: Covers city transit July 10–14, not intercity train.

slots.name: Lunch: Trzesniewski open sandwiches
slots.description: Iconic Viennese standing snack bar with small open-faced sandwiches, ideal for an inexpensive first local meal.
slots.notes: Flagship location; open Friday daytime.

slots.name: Self-guided Innere Stadt walk
slots.description: Walk Stephansplatz, Graben, Kohlmarkt, Hofburg exterior, Michaelerplatz, and hidden courtyards/Durchhäuser around the old town. Low-cost orientation on foot.
slots.notes: Keep this flexible after travel.

slots.name: Check in: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt
slots.description: Budget accommodation in the 7th district with Wi‑Fi, close to U3 Zieglergasse and Mariahilfer Straße. Quoted hotel search rate €96/night for 4 nights.
slots.notes: Check-in time not verified; ask hotel for early luggage drop if room is not ready.

slots.name: Dinner: Griechenbeisl
slots.description: Traditional Austrian dinner in one of Vienna’s oldest restaurants, near Schwedenplatz; historic rooms and classic dishes.
slots.notes: Reserve ahead; estimate assumes moderate mains and drinks for 2.

slots.name: Breakfast at Café Sperl
slots.description: Historic Viennese coffee house breakfast before a museum-heavy day. Café Sperl is open Saturdays in July; avoid Sundays in July/August due to Sunday closure.
slots.notes: Estimated for 2 coffees and pastries/light breakfast.

slots.name: Walk/transit to Kunsthistorisches Museum
slots.description: From the hotel area to Maria-Theresien-Platz; hotel is about a 20–25 minute walk or short U3 ride to Volkstheater/MuseumsQuartier.
slots.notes: Routing API was unavailable; estimate based on verified hotel and museum transit proximity.

slots.name: Kunsthistorisches Museum
slots.description: Focus on Bruegel, the Kunstkammer, Egyptian/Greek collections, and Klimt’s staircase decorations. Official July hours: daily 10:00–18:00.
slots.notes: Estimated €22 per adult.

slots.name: Lunch: Figlmüller Bäckerstraße
slots.description: Classic schnitzel lunch in the old town; official hours daily 11:30–23:30, kitchen until 22:00.
slots.notes: Reserve; estimate for 2 schnitzels/sides and soft drinks.

slots.name: Hofburg exterior and imperial lanes walk
slots.description: Walk through Graben/Kohlmarkt to Michaelerplatz, Hofburg courtyards, Volksgarten, and Ringstraße viewpoints. Keeps costs low while covering imperial Vienna on foot.
slots.notes: Optional paid Sisi Museum if budget allows, but not included in cost.

slots.name: Coffee and cake break
slots.description: Pause for Melange and cake in the historic center. Café Central is expected closed for renovation in 2026, so use Café Museum or another open café nearby.
slots.location: Café Museum or nearby historic café
slots.notes: Café Central renovation noted in research; not scheduled.

slots.name: Dinner: Plachutta Wollzeile
slots.description: Traditional Tafelspitz dinner at a classic Vienna restaurant; open daily 11:30–23:30.
slots.notes: Reserve; this is the splurge dinner of the trip.

slots.name: Breakfast at Café Museum
slots.description: Classic Vienna café near Karlsplatz; breakfast is served daily until 11:30.
slots.notes: Good start before Stadtpark and Belvedere.

slots.name: Lunch: Meierei im Stadtpark
slots.description: Casual bistro/café in Stadtpark from the Steirereck group; note official research suggests Sunday opening may vary, so verify/reserve or substitute Café Museum if closed.
slots.location: Meierei im Stadtpark, Am Heumarkt 2a, 1030 Vienna
slots.notes: If Sunday closure is confirmed, replace with Café Museum or trude at Wien Museum.

slots.name: Stadtpark morning walk
slots.description: Walk through Stadtpark to see the Johann Strauss monument and green spaces before lunch; free and central.
slots.notes: Pairs naturally with Meierei in Stadtpark.

slots.name: Transfer/walk to Upper Belvedere
slots.description: Walk or take tram toward Prinz-Eugen-Straße for Belvedere. The site is south-east of the Ring; allow about 30 minutes from Stadtpark area.
slots.notes: Covered by Vienna transport ticket if using tram.

slots.name: Upper Belvedere museum
slots.description: Visit Klimt’s The Kiss, Austrian art collections, and Baroque palace rooms. Official visitor info: Upper Belvedere opens daily, typically 09:00–18:00.
slots.notes: Estimated €20 per adult; book timed entry.

slots.name: Belvedere Gardens walk
slots.description: Walk the free formal gardens between Upper and Lower Belvedere for city views and photos.
slots.notes: Free outdoor component.

slots.name: Dinner: Bitzinger Würstelstand Albertina
slots.description: Budget-friendly Viennese street food: Käsekrainer or bratwurst near the Opera/Albertina. Open daily 08:00–04:00.
slots.notes: Keeps the day budget balanced after museum tickets.

slots.name: Breakfast near Mariahilfer Straße
slots.description: Simple café/bakery breakfast near the hotel before taking U4/U-Bahn connections toward Schönbrunn.
slots.location: Near Hotel Pension Walzerstadt / Mariahilfer Straße
slots.notes: Use local bakery/café to preserve budget.

slots.name: Schönbrunn Palace Park and Gloriette walk
slots.description: Explore the free palace gardens, Great Parterre, fountains, and walk up to the Gloriette. Palace park July hours researched as 06:30–21:00; palace interiors are optional if budget allows.
slots.location: Schönbrunn Palace Park, Schönbrunner Schloßstraße 47, 1130 Vienna
slots.notes: Free garden-focused option preserves total budget.

slots.name: Lunch: Joseph II Schloss-Restaurant Schönbrunn
slots.description: Convenient Austrian lunch inside the Schönbrunn complex; official research found daily opening 11:00–20:30, hot food 11:30–19:30.
slots.notes: Estimate for moderate lunch for 2; reserve if possible.

slots.name: Transfer to Karlsplatz / MuseumsQuartier
slots.description: Transit back toward central Vienna for free/low-cost museum and MQ time.
slots.notes: Covered by Vienna ticket.

slots.name: Wien Museum Karlsplatz and MuseumsQuartier walk
slots.description: Visit the free permanent exhibition at Wien Museum Karlsplatz if open and continue on foot through Karlsplatz, Secession exterior, Naschmarkt edge, and MuseumsQuartier courtyards. Note: Wien Museum is normally closed Mondays, so if closed use MQ courtyards/Spittelberg walk instead.
slots.notes: Monday closure likely; the walk/MQ courtyards remain valid and free.

slots.name: Transfer to Schönbrunn
slots.description: Use Vienna public transport from the 7th district toward U4 Schönbrunn/Hietzing for the palace park. Exact live route unavailable, but Schönbrunn is directly served by U4.
slots.location: Hotel Pension Walzerstadt → Schönbrunn Palace Park
slots.notes: Covered by 7-day Vienna ticket.

slots.name: Dinner: Glacis Beisl
slots.description: Traditional Viennese Beisl cuisine with garden atmosphere beside MuseumsQuartier; official source found daily opening 12:00–00:00.
slots.notes: Good fit after MQ/Spittelberg walk.

slots.name: Early hotel checkout and station breakfast
slots.description: Check out, leave luggage if possible, and grab an easy breakfast near Zieglergasse or at Wien Hbf.
slots.notes: Exact hotel checkout time unavailable; confirm with property.

slots.name: Optional final city walk / souvenir stop
slots.description: Light final walk around Mariahilfer Straße or the hotel neighborhood; keep it flexible for luggage and checkout timing.
slots.notes: Free buffer before train.

slots.name: Lunch: casual Austrian bite near station
slots.description: Simple budget lunch before departure, either at Wien Hbf food court or an inexpensive bakery/snack spot.
slots.notes: Lower-cost placeholder for 2 people to keep total trip under €1,200.

slots.name: Transfer to Wien Hauptbahnhof
slots.description: Collect bags and use public transport to Wien Hbf for the return train.
slots.notes: Covered by Vienna ticket.

slots.name: Direct Railjet train: Vienna → Munich
slots.description: Return by direct ÖBB/DB Railjet-style service from Wien Hbf to München Hbf. Exact July 2026 schedule not yet finalized; typical direct journey about 4 hours.
slots.notes: Estimated one-way cost for 2 adults: €25 each plus seat reservation allowance.
